rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL
fail_reason: 7 of 8 prior-art results trigger hits via semantic and functional thresholds. Most damning: Kimi Linear (2510.26692) interleaves linear+full attention, Hybrid Linear Attention study (2507.06457) systematically covers hybrid linear+full attention, Neural Attention Search Linear (2602.03681) mixes linear+softmax at token level, and Balancing Computation Load in Parallel Hybrid Networks (2505.19472) explicitly implements parallel-branch hybrid networks — directly matching DROSERA's parallel-bicameral linear+quadratic primitive. The candidate's claimed novelty (parallel hybrid linear+quadratic substrates with streaming-first delivery) is already covered by existing parallel-hybrid attention architectures.
